title: Build a basic LED circuit
description: Learn electronics fundamentals by lighting up a simple LED.

dialogue.text: Hey there! I'm Orion. Want to see how easy electronics can be? Let's build a simple LED circuit together.
You'll need an LED, a 330 ohm resistor, a breadboard, and a battery pack or USB power source. Ready to put it together?
Place the LED on the breadboard and connect the resistor in series with the long leg. Hook everything up to power and the LED should glow.
Great job! You've built your first circuit and lit up an LED.
